This '''Mandalorian officer''' was the leader of a small contingent of [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] who had crash-landed on [[Lehon/Legends|Lehon]] some time either prior to or during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] or [[Jedi Civil War]]. During the final stages of the latter conflict, [[Gender/Legends|he]] and the troops under his command, wearing [[Stealth field generator/Legends|stealth]] units, ambushed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] and his companions. Revan's group [[Death/Legends|dispatched]] the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] and his men.

==Behind the scenes==
This Mandalorian is never named in the game; he is only called "Mandalorian Captain" when targeted. Apart from [[Gorse Bendak|Bendak Starkiller]], this man is the only other Mandalorian in the game to wear gold-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Neo-Crusader armor]].

When killing him, the player would obtain an "Mandalorian Assault Armor", the strongest non-upgradeable armor in the game.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
